# pii_govid_intl corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === India ===
# expect: India PAN
AAAPZ1234C

# expect: India GSTIN
22AAAAA0000A1Z5

# expect: India IFSC
HDFC0001234

# expect: India Aadhaar (labeled)
Aadhaar: 2234 5678 9012

# === South America ===
# expect: Brazil CPF
123.456.789-09

# expect: Brazil CNPJ
00.623.904/0001-73
12ABC34DE5FG26

# expect: Chile RUT
12.345.678-K

# expect: Argentina CUIL/CUIT
20-10563145-8

# === Greater China ===
# China Resident ID is checksum-gated (Block 6e); value is synthetic but
# ISO 7064 MOD 11-2 valid.
# expect: China Resident ID
110101199003071233

# expect: China Passport
E12345678

# expect: Taiwan National ID
A123456789

# === Korea ===
# expect: Korea RRN
991231-1234567

# === South & Southeast Asia ===
# expect: Pakistan CNIC
35202-1234567-1

# expect: Sri Lanka NIC (old)
871234567V

# expect: Singapore NRIC/FIN
S0000001I

# expect: Malaysia MyKad
630916-01-1234

# expect: Indonesia NPWP
12.345.678.9-012.345

# expect: Indonesia NIK (labeled)
NIK: 3201011506800001

# === Middle East ===
# expect: UAE Emirates ID
784-1990-1234567-1

# === Africa ===
# expect: Egypt National ID
29001011234567

# expect: Ghana Card PIN
GHA-123456789-1

# expect: South Africa ID (labeled)
South Africa ID: 8001015009087

# === Middle East (Block 6g, checksum-gated) ===
# Turkey TCKN is keyword-free (two check digits); Israel Teudat Zehut is
# label-gated (single mod-10 too FP-prone bare). Synthetic, checksum-valid.
# expect: Turkey TC Kimlik No
19191919190
# expect: Israel Teudat Zehut (labeled)
Israel ID: 039285754

# === Oceania ===
# expect: Australia TFN (labeled)
TFN: 123 456 789

# expect: New Zealand NHI
ABC1234

# === Passport MRZ TD3 (Block 4a, validator-gated) ===
# expect: Passport MRZ (TD3)
P<UTOERIKSSON<<ANNA<MARIA<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<
L898902C36UTO7408122F1204159ZE184226B<<<<<10

# === Canada Driver's License distinctive formats (Block 4b) ===
# expect: Canada Driver's License (distinctive province format)
A1234-5678901203
Q123456789012
ABCDE123456789
